con:mockResponse.name: ServerError
con:mockResponse.con:responseContent: <soap:Envelope xmlns:soap="http://schemas.xmlsoap.org/soap/envelope/" xmlns:doc="http://example.com/products"> <soap:Header/> <soap:Body> <soap:Fault> <faultcode>soap:Server</faultcode> <faultstring>Internal Server Error</faultstring> <detail> <doc:UploadDocumentResponse> <doc:success>false</doc:success> <doc:message>Error processing document upload</doc:message> <doc:status>ERROR</doc:status> <doc:responseCode>500</doc:responseCode> <doc:errorCode>ERR-500</doc:errorCode> <doc:errorMessage>Failed to process the upload request</doc:errorMessage> <doc:requestId>req-error-001</doc:requestId> <doc:sourceSystem>ms-products-mock</doc:sourceSystem> </doc:UploadDocumentResponse> </detail> </soap:Fault> </soap:Body> </soap:Envelope>

con:mockResponse.name: ValidationError
con:mockResponse.con:responseContent: <soap:Envelope xmlns:soap="http://schemas.xmlsoap.org/soap/envelope/" xmlns:doc="http://example.com/products"> <soap:Header/> <soap:Body> <soap:Fault> <faultcode>soap:Client</faultcode> <faultstring>Validation Error</faultstring> <detail> <doc:UploadDocumentResponse> <doc:success>false</doc:success> <doc:message>Invalid request parameters</doc:message> <doc:status>VALIDATION_ERROR</doc:status> <doc:responseCode>400</doc:responseCode> <doc:errorCode>ERR-400</doc:errorCode> <doc:errorMessage>Required fields missing: entityId or operation</doc:errorMessage> <doc:requestId>req-validation-001</doc:requestId> <doc:sourceSystem>ms-products-mock</doc:sourceSystem> </doc:UploadDocumentResponse> </detail> </soap:Fault> </soap:Body> </soap:Envelope>

con:mockResponse.name: Timeout
con:mockResponse.con:responseContent: <soap:Envelope xmlns:soap="http://schemas.xmlsoap.org/soap/envelope/" xmlns:doc="http://example.com/products"> <soap:Header/> <soap:Body> <soap:Fault> <faultcode>soap:Server</faultcode> <faultstring>Gateway Timeout</faultstring> <detail> <doc:UploadDocumentResponse> <doc:success>false</doc:success> <doc:message>Request processing timeout</doc:message> <doc:status>TIMEOUT</doc:status> <doc:responseCode>504</doc:responseCode> <doc:errorCode>ERR-504</doc:errorCode> <doc:errorMessage>The request timed out after 10 seconds</doc:errorMessage> <doc:requestId>req-timeout-001</doc:requestId> <doc:sourceSystem>ms-products-mock</doc:sourceSystem> </doc:UploadDocumentResponse> </detail> </soap:Fault> </soap:Body> </soap:Envelope>

con:definitionCache.con:part:
<definitions name="ProductService" targetNamespace="http://example.com/products" xmlns="http://schemas.xmlsoap.org/wsdl/" xmlns:soap="http://schemas.xmlsoap.org/wsdl/soap/" xmlns:tns="http://example.com/products" xmlns:xsd="http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema">
<types> <xsd:schema targetNamespace="http://example.com/products"> <xsd:element name="UploadDocumentRequest"> <xsd:complexType> <xsd:sequence> <xsd:element name="entityId" type="xsd:string"/> <xsd:element name="operation" type="xsd:string"/> <xsd:element name="requestId" type="xsd:string"/> <xsd:element name="timestamp" type="xsd:string"/> <xsd:element name="sourceSystem" type="xsd:string"/> <xsd:element name="fileName" type="xsd:string" minOccurs="0"/> <xsd:element name="fileSize" type="xsd:long" minOccurs="0"/> <xsd:element name="fileExtension" type="xsd:string" minOccurs="0"/> </xsd:sequence> </xsd:complexType> </xsd:element>
<xsd:element name="UploadDocumentResponse"> <xsd:complexType> <xsd:sequence> <xsd:element name="success" type="xsd:boolean"/> <xsd:element name="message" type="xsd:string"/> <xsd:element name="documentId" type="xsd:string" minOccurs="0"/> <xsd:element name="entityId" type="xsd:string" minOccurs="0"/> <xsd:element name="fileName" type="xsd:string" minOccurs="0"/> <xsd:element name="fileSize" type="xsd:long" minOccurs="0"/> <xsd:element name="fileUrl" type="xsd:string" minOccurs="0"/> <xsd:element name="status" type="xsd:string" minOccurs="0"/> <xsd:element name="responseCode" type="xsd:string" minOccurs="0"/> <xsd:element name="processedAt" type="xsd:string" minOccurs="0"/> <xsd:element name="processingTimeMs" type="xsd:long" minOccurs="0"/> <xsd:element name="requestId" type="xsd:string" minOccurs="0"/> <xsd:element name="errorCode" type="xsd:string" minOccurs="0"/> <xsd:element name="errorMessage" type="xsd:string" minOccurs="0"/> </xsd:sequence> </xsd:complexType> </xsd:element> </xsd:schema> </types>
<message name="UploadDocumentRequestMessage"> <part name="parameters" element="tns:UploadDocumentRequest"/> </message>
<message name="UploadDocumentResponseMessage"> <part name="parameters" element="tns:UploadDocumentResponse"/> </message>
<portType name="ProductServicePortType"> <operation name="UploadDocument"> <input message="tns:UploadDocumentRequestMessage"/> <output message="tns:UploadDocumentResponseMessage"/> </operation> </portType>
<binding name="ProductServiceSoapBinding" type="tns:ProductServicePortType"> <soap:binding style="document" transport="http://schemas.xmlsoap.org/soap/http"/> <operation name="UploadDocument"> <soap:operation soapAction="http://example.com/products/UploadDocument"/> <input> <soap:body use="literal"/> </input> <output> <soap:body use="literal"/> </output> </operation> </binding>
<service name="ProductService"> <port name="ProductServicePort" binding="tns:ProductServiceSoapBinding"> <soap:address location="http://localhost:8081/ws/product"/> </port> </service> </definitions>
